name: sbshift
description: Typed CLI orchestrator for cross-region Supabase project migration via logical replication.
author: Erfi Anugrah <erfi.anugrah@gmail.com>

scripts.test:scale: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml run --rm -e ROWS=1000000 runner sh -c 'bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run test/scale.harness.ts'
